evals.prompt: I just built an AI tool and want to launch it on ProductBurst to get my first users. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Launch checklist with listing optimization, engagement strategy, and multi-platform launch recommendation

assertions.name: launch_checklist
assertions.description: Covers listing preparation: tagline, description, screenshots, URL

assertions.name: timing_advice
assertions.description: Recommends launching early in the day for maximum daily ranking window

assertions.name: engagement_strategy
assertions.description: Suggests engaging in comment threads and sharing externally to drive upvotes

assertions.name: multi_platform
assertions.description: Recommends pairing ProductBurst with other launch platforms (MicroLaunch, Product Hunt)

evals.prompt: I have an idea but haven't built anything yet. Can I test interest on ProductBurst before building?
evals.expected_output: Confirms idea-stage posting is allowed, provides structure for validation post

assertions.name: idea_stage_allowed
assertions.description: Confirms ProductBurst allows posting ideas without a working product

assertions.name: post_structure
assertions.description: Helps structure the idea post with problem statement, proposed solution, and specific questions

assertions.name: validation_signals
assertions.description: Explains how to interpret upvotes and comments as validation signals

assertions.name: platform_comparison
assertions.description: Notes that other platforms like Product Hunt and MicroLaunch require working products

evals.prompt: Should I launch on ProductBurst or Product Hunt first?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of both platforms with recommendation to use ProductBurst as soft launch before Product Hunt

assertions.name: ranking_comparison
assertions.description: Compares PH single-day window vs ProductBurst daily/weekly ongoing rankings

assertions.name: traffic_reality
assertions.description: Notes Product Hunt has significantly higher traffic and backlink value (DR91 vs DR46)

assertions.name: sequenced_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends ProductBurst first as soft launch, then Product Hunt with refined messaging

assertions.name: not_exclusive
assertions.description: Clarifies they're not mutually exclusive — use both in sequence
